content.speakerText: When’s the deadline to register? I don’t wanna miss it.
content.speakerTextCn: 报名截止日是哪天？我不想错过。
expectedAnswers: It’s this Friday at 5 PM. No extensions!
Friday at 5 — better get it done early.
Deadline’s Friday; late registrations will be charged a fee.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确回答截止日期和时间
语言准确性：语法正确，使用口语化表达（如'Friday at 5'）
表达自然度：包含场景关键词（deadline, extensions, late fee）

content.speakerText: Do I need to pay anything when I register?
expectedAnswers: Nope, it’s free for undergrads. Grad students pay $50.
No fee at all — just confirm your choices.
Free if you register before Friday. After that, there’s a $20 late fee.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：区分不同身份的费用情况
语言准确性：使用正确动词和金额表达（pay, fee, $）
表达自然度：使用口语缩略形式（Nope, just）和场景关键词（register, fee）

content.speakerText: What are the steps to register for the program?
content.speakerTextCn: 报名这个项目的步骤是什么？
expectedAnswers: First, fill out the online form. Then, confirm your courses. Finally, submit your documents by Friday.
You need to choose your courses, complete the application, and make sure it’s done before the deadline.
Step one: log in to the portal. Step two: select your classes. Step three: click submit. Deadline is Friday!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰列出至少两个报名步骤
语言准确性：使用顺序连接词（first, then, finally）或流程表达
表达自然度：包含场景关键词（register, confirm, deadline, submit）且语调自然
